extortion.description: Decades of Mechanical and Electrical Engineering, Design and Testing. Innovative smart pigging tools. An evolutionary Data Science practice. ENTEGRA’s technologies meet the real demands of pipeline operators around the world. It’s not just about getting ILI tools launched and through the pipeline. It’s about being able to accurately deliver state-of-the-art UHR imaging of the pipe 100% of the time. It’s about pipeline integrity.
